description: A high-power rocket design has been structurally finalized, but it lacks the necessary rail hardware (launch lugs/buttons) for pad departure, and the manufacturing team needs 1:1 scale templates to cut the fins and mark the body tube. Using the design in dual_parachute_deployment.ork, add two launch lugs to the exterior. Both lugs must share the same radial angle and be separated by at least 300mm longitudinally. Each lug should have an outer diameter between 8mm and 12mm and a length between 10mm and 20mm. Verify the updated drag profile via simulation. Export a PDF containing the 'Fin templates' and 'Fin marking guide' to ~/Documents/exports/manufacturing_blueprints.pdf and save the updated design to ~/Documents/rockets/manufacturing_ready.ork.
